entity.summary: Berachain's native decentralized exchange, built around Balancer-style vault and pool architecture and exposed through the official Berachain application and developer tooling. BEX became available with Berachain mainnet in February 2025 and remains documented with deployed mainnet contracts, swap guides, and liquidity-pool integrations.
entity.notes: The source candidate name BeraSwap is normalized to BEX, the canonical name used by Berachain. Launch date follows the Berachain mainnet launch because BEX is the chain-native exchange and its mainnet deployment is documented as part of the official mainnet stack.

events.title: BEX launched with Berachain mainnet
events.description: Berachain's native BEX decentralized exchange became available as part of the chain's February 2025 mainnet launch.
events.notes: The mainnet launch date is used as the public launch marker for the native exchange deployment.

evidence.title: What Is BEX?
evidence.notes: Official documentation identifies BEX as Berachain's native decentralized exchange.

evidence.title: Berachain to Roll Out Its Mainnet on Feb. 6
evidence.notes: Independent launch-date source for Berachain mainnet, used as BEX's public mainnet launch marker.

evidence.title: BEX developer overview
evidence.notes: Official developer documentation covers current BEX swaps, liquidity pools, LP tokens, and integration resources.

evidence.title: BEX deployed contracts
evidence.notes: Official registry of BEX mainnet contract addresses.
